creator: bruce.richardson@intel.com
text:
Unfortunately, no, there is no single changelog I have for this update, but the following links give some details of the updates since the previous .5 release:

.6 -> .7: http://inbox.dpdk.org/announce/20221213140809.3845954-1-luca.boccassi@gmail.com/T/#u

.5 -> .6: http://inbox.dpdk.org/announce/20220829150456.2223782-1-xuemingl@nvidia.com/T/#u

Currently enquiring as to whether there is an available similar announcement email listing patches applied from .7 to .8 releases.
